name: Bar priority board
description: Visual lane that isolates the drinks most likely to block guest flow, table turns, or recovery moments if they sit in the general queue.
source_ref: core-v2: priority surfaces should make blocking work unmistakably visible
usage_moment: Use during live bar service when certain tickets need protected handling to preserve table flow.
expected_output: A short visible queue of table-critical drink tickets with explicit entry and clearing rules.
